sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: Position Size = Account Equity ÷ (maximum loss × optimal f). Optimal f is calculated from historical trade outcome stream (e.g., f=0.17 yields 1 unit per $29.41; f=0.09 yields 1 share per $5). No fractional Kelly adjustment stated by author.

source_rule_text: Position size should be 1 unit for every dollar amount equal to the negative of (maximum loss × optimal f), where optimal f is derived from the stream of trade outcomes.
